2017-T1-P3-S1.trunk: S+V+O：the TSA found … that …（去年运输安全管理局在一次秘密检查中发现…）
structure: 主句：the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) found in a secret check that …
└ 宾语从句(that)：undercover investigators were able to sneak weapons … past airport security nearly every time they tried
├ 破折号插入〔修饰 weapons〕：both fake and real
└ 时间状语从句(every time)：nearly every time they tried
2017-T1-P3-S1.logic: that 引导 found 的宾语从句（in a secret check 状语插在中间）；破折号插入 both fake and real 修饰 weapons；every time 引导时间状语从句（每当…时）。
notes: that 引导 found 的宾语从句（in a secret check 插在 found 与 that 之间）。
破折号夹的 both fake and real 是 weapons 的插入修饰。
every time (they tried) 相当于连词，引导时间状语从句（每次尝试时）；sneak … past 偷偷带过。

2017-T1-P1-S1.trunk: S+be+表语从句：this is how far in advance authorities are recommending people show up …（这就是当局建议人们提前多久到场）
structure: 破折号前（铺垫状语）：First two hours, now three hours
主句：this is how far in advance authorities are recommending people show up to catch a domestic flight
├ 表语从句(how)：how far in advance authorities are recommending people show up
│   └ 宾语从句(省略 that，虚拟)：people show up（recommend (that) people (should) show up）
├ 不定式作目的：to catch a domestic flight
└ 状语：at least at some major U.S. airports with increasingly massive security lines
2017-T1-P1-S1.logic: 破折号前是铺垫；主句 this is how…（how 引导表语从句）；recommend (that) people show up（虚拟省略）；to catch… 目的。
notes: this is how far in advance…：how 引导表语从句（这就是…要提前多久）。
are recommending people show up：recommend (that) sb (should) do 的虚拟（省略 that 与 should）。
to catch a domestic flight 目的状语；with increasingly massive security lines 修饰 airports。

2017-T1-P3-S2.trunk: S+V+介宾：Enhanced security measures … have resulted in long waits（增强的安检措施…导致了长时间的等待）
structure: 主句：Enhanced security measures since then … have resulted in long waits at major airports such as Chicago's O'Hare International
└ 过去分词作状语/插入：combined with a rise in airline travel due to the improving economy and low oil prices
└ due to… 介词短语作定语〔修饰 a rise〕：due to the improving economy and low oil prices
2017-T1-P3-S2.logic: 主语 measures + 谓语 have resulted in（被 combined with… 过去分词插入隔开，主谓分隔）；due to… 修饰 a rise。
notes: 主谓分隔：主语 Enhanced security measures 与谓语 have resulted 被 combined with…（过去分词插入）隔开。
combined with…：过去分词短语作状语（再加上…）；与主语视为并列概念，谓语用复数 have。
due to the improving economy and low oil prices：介词短语作定语修饰 a rise（因经济好转与低油价）。
